documentation.description: Deploy the contract; GlobalState values are auto-initialized.
Configure DAO parameters (quorum and voting period); creator-only, one-time setup.

args.quorum: - minimum yes-votes required to execute a proposal
args.votingPeriod: - number of rounds a proposal stays open for voting

documentation.description: Submit a new proposal and emit a ProposalCreated event; returns the proposal ID.
Cast a yes/no vote on an open proposal with deduplication.

args.proposalId: - the ID of the proposal to vote on
args.inFavor: - true for yes, false for no

documentation.description: Execute a proposal that reached quorum after voting ends.

args.proposalId: - the ID of the proposal to execute

documentation.description: Count and return the number of proposals that met quorum.
documentation.returns: the number of proposals that reached the quorum threshold

documentation.description: Shut down the DAO, delete all proposal boxes, and emit a DaoClosed event; creator-only.
